positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring bioluminescent ocean life—koi fish, stylized coral formations, and glowing jellyfish—set against a deep midnight blue and turquoise gradient. The overall composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a single circular frame. Style is clean, geometric, vector-art quality, with sharp outlines, strong contrasts, and flat color blocking. Use high-detail luminescence effects (glowing accents) against deep shadow. The aesthetic should evoke magical realism, suitable for a high-contrast, durable print on fabric. Minimalist, tattoo flash inspired, symmetrical composition. Perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermarks, signature, logo, watermark, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, 3d render, photo-realistic, messy, cluttered
